threads.config.render_thread.tooltip: Default %s. Higher value, more stable FPS. Applies on world join and resets on leaving.
threads.config.server_thread.tooltip: Default %s. Higher value, more stable TPS. Low values may cause in-world delays. Applies on world join and resets on leaving.
threads.config.sound_engine.tooltip: Default %s. Setting too low may cause sound delays. Applies on world join and resets on leaving.
threads.config.every_other_thread.toolti: Default Off. Sets priority for every other thread that exists in background. Applies on world join, will not reset on leaving.
threads.config.thread_blacklist.tooltip: List of thread names to ignore for 'Every other thread' option.
threads.config.debug.tooltip: Default %s. Logs debug information with thread names that received priority changes.
threads.config.show_button.tooltip: Default %s. Show 'Threads' button in mainmenu and pause screen. Config menu still can can be accessed by pressing [%s].
